basic_details.job_title: BMRCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bangalore Metro Rail Corporation Limited (BMRCL) has published the Company Secretary Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Company Secretary position. Candidates up to 50 years of age and holding Associate Membership of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ACS/FCS) along with a Degree in Law are eligible to apply online at the official BMRCL website. The application process will remain active up to 04 July 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

qualification.education_qualification: Associate Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ACS/FCS) with degree in Law
qualification.details: An Associate Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ACS/FCS) with a degree in Law. Minimum 15 years of post-qualification experience, of which at least 7 years as Company Secretary in a company of repute. Weightage for 10 years in Government/PSU. Knowledge of Kannada is desirable.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BMRCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BMRCL Company Secretary Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BMRCL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BMRCL Company Secretary Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BMRCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BMRCL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BMRCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BMRCL Company Secretary recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the BMRCL Company Secretary position is July 4, 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Company Secretary post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be an Associate Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ACS/FCS) and possess a degree in Law. Additional experience requirements are also detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Company Secretary post is 50 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, which are detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Company Secretary position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Company Secretary post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 2,06,250/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Company Secretary post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Company Secretary in the Bangalore Metro Rail Corporation Limited (BMRCL) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for BMRCL Company Secretary recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official BMRCL website or use the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for BMRCL Company Secretary recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the BMRCL Company Secretary recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Company Secretary role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Company Secretary position at BMRCL will primarily involve an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this BMRCL recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Company Secretary position at BMRCL is contractual. This means the appointment will be for a specified period as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for BMRCL Company Secretary recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
